title: Produce stats.py v0 prototype
description:
Build workspace/src/stats.py from scratch.

Read DONE_CRITERIA.md first to understand scope and stopping conditions.

Implement a CLI that:
- Takes a CSV file path as command-line argument
- Reads numbers (one per line)
- Computes and prints: count, mean, median, population stddev
- Handles empty file gracefully
- Uses stdlib only (no pip deps)

Speed over polish. Runnable with `python stats.py <file>`.

note: stats.py v0 complete: reads CSV, outputs count/mean/median/stddev. Handles empty files, single values, even/odd counts. Tested on happy path: ✓ multiple values ✓ single value ✓ empty file ✓ file not found. No external deps.

title: Critique stats.py v1
description:
Read DONE_CRITERIA.md, then review workspace/src/stats.py.

Produce workspace/critiques/critique_v1.md with:
- Summary of code function and correctness
- Issues ranked by severity: CRITICAL (breaks goal), IMPORTANT (violates criteria), NICE-TO-HAVE (polish)
- For each issue: clear description and suggested fix

Use the DONE_CRITERIA.md as the stopping yardstick. A weekend prototype is fine — do not demand enterprise patterns, tests, or advanced features.

Be concise and rigorous.
